refined_caption: The hospital privacy curtain in the room appears to be torn or damaged. The tear is visible and may compromise patient privacy.
complaint_description: I was admitted to the hospital and noticed that the privacy curtain in my room was torn. This made me feel uncomfortable and concerned about my privacy. I hope this can be addressed soon to ensure all patients have a comfortable and private stay.
voice_text: The curtain in my hospital room is all torn, can someone please fix it? It's making me feel really uncomfortable.
